text:
There once was a small town filled with cats. They had their own language, and they loved living life outdoors. Every day was a sunny one. They'd chase insects, fish swimming underwater, and each other.

One particular kitten loved flying. Every chance he got, he’d leap into the sky. People laughed. Birds scolded. But he loved soaring.

One occasion came when he flew too low. Into a river. But he didn’t sink. Just floated there, feeling incredible.

Then a wise old owl perched on a branch. “What’s up?”

Just me. He chuckled. “Flying’s nice. Makes you feel big.”

The owl spread his wings. “Why not join me?”

Iowa? He shook his head. “I think not. You’ll wear feathers."

Hours passed. Night was falling. Owl flew off. The kitten paddled back.

He dreamed big. Not just soaring. Changing the world.

One day, a large owl flew low.
